---
name: Governance RFC
about: Propose a governance, constitutional, or protocol-rule change.
title: "[RFC] "
labels: [governance]
assignees: []
---

## Problem

What concrete governance or constitutional problem needs a decision?

## Why this matters

Why does this matter for Genesis Protocol now?

## Proposal

State the proposed rule, mechanism, or process change directly.

## Scope

What does this affect?

- [ ] charter or axioms
- [ ] governance flow
- [ ] minority protection
- [ ] fork legitimacy
- [ ] review or challenge process
- [ ] architecture or implementation semantics
- [ ] other

## Invariants

What must remain true if this proposal is accepted?

## Failure modes

How could this be abused, captured, or produce bad outcomes?

## Alternatives considered

List the strongest rejected alternatives and why they fail.

## Impacted documents

Which files, schemas, or workflows would need updates?

## Open questions

What is still unresolved?
